title: [MTR 3/4] Stepford Connect and Waterline Class 730
description: Adds repaints for the Class 730 by Soodari based off of Stepford Connect and Waterline from Stepford County Railway
body:
**MTR (and for the MTR 3 version NTE) required!!!!**

Ever wanted the 730 SCR Liveries in Minecraft? Well today's your lucky day!

**_What does this pack add?_**

-Waterline Class 730 (3 Car and two different catenary heights)

-Stepford Connect Class 730 (5 Car and two different catenary heights)

Disclaimer:
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Roblox, Stepford County Railway (SCR), Stepford Connect, or any related entities.

**Enjoy using these trains in your minecraft train system!**

_Model made by Soodari, textures made by Shoclyhd_
